rationale: Top-of-form LP name. Form serves both Maine domestic and foreign LPs from a single 'entity.name' widget — no separate entity.home_jurisdiction_name slot is provided here, unlike MLPA-12A/12B. Foreign-LP filers should populate entity.name with the name on file with Maine SOS (which may be the home-jurisdiction name or the Maine fictitious name).

label_verbatim: FIRST: Name of record requiring correction
rationale: Title of the original document being corrected (e.g., 'Certificate of Limited Partnership', 'Certificate of Amendment'). Same key as MLLC-17.

label_verbatim: SECOND: Date on which the record was filed by Secretary of State
rationale: Date the original erroneous record was filed. Same key as MLLC-17.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The incorrect information and the reason it is incorrect or the manner in which the signing was defective is (Attach separate document if more space is needed.)
rationale: Multiline text widget for describing the error or defective signing. Same key as MLLC-17.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The portion of the said record is corrected to read in its entirety as follows (Attach separate document if more space is needed.)
rationale: Multiline text widget for the corrected content. Same key as MLLC-17.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: (Foreign Limited Partnership Only) Jurisdiction of organization
rationale: Foreign LP's home jurisdiction (only required when the corrected record belongs to a foreign LP).

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: ...and the date on which the limited partnership was authorized to do business in Maine
rationale: Date of Maine authorization for foreign LPs (paired with entity.home_jurisdiction in the SEVENTH block).
Date the statement was signed.
Printed name of the individual GP signer (per-officer signer pattern; only one inline slot since §1324.1.J requires only one GP signature). Same shape as MLPA-12A, MLPA-12B, MLPA-13A.

label_verbatim: For General Partner(s) which are Entities: Name of Entity
rationale: Name of an entity GP signer (alternative to individual signer).

label_verbatim: By (signature) / (type or print name) [entity GP signer]
rationale: Printed name + capacity of authorized signer for the entity GP. Note: the form's column header reads '(type or print name)' rather than '(type or print name and capacity)' as on MLPA-12A/12B — but the underlying canonical primitive (combined name+capacity for an entity-GP signer) is the same per the per-officer-signer convention.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive). Field-id is the literal label 'Name of entity'.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite enum value 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite enum value '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite enum value 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees (base $50 per page-0 header plus expedite premium).
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Annual-report reminder email.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
